net.finmath.finitedifference.solvers.adi.AbstractADI3D

Package
Description
net.finmath.finitedifference.solvers.adi
Package net.finmath.finitedifference.solvers.adi.

  • Uses of AbstractADI3D in net.finmath.finitedifference.solvers.adi

    Subclasses of AbstractADI3D in net.finmath.finitedifference.solvers.adi
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FDMAsianHestonADI3D
    Specialized 3D ADI solver for arithmetic Asian options under a lifted Heston state (S, v, I), where dS_t = mu_S dt + diffusion terms, dv_t = mu_v dt + diffusion terms, dI_t = S_t dt.
    class 
    FDMAsianSabrADI3D
    Specialized three-dimensional ADI solver for arithmetic Asian options under a lifted SABR state (S,\alpha,I).
